note: M-006 T2 proposed real-site selectors from CDP-attached operator-owned Chromium; source real.json was not edited.

_justifications.attributes.turn_id: Stable per-assistant-turn id attribute was present; only the attribute name was recorded.
_justifications.selectors.assistant_message: Stable data attribute identifies assistant-authored message containers.
_justifications.selectors.chat_item: Conversation history items are stable links whose href path starts with /c/; titles are not read.
_justifications.selectors.chat_list: Navigation landmark containing /c/ conversation links is stable and title-free.
_justifications.selectors.completion_marker: Turn action/copy control appeared after streaming completed; pair with stop-button disappearance and stable wait.
_justifications.selectors.composer: Stable composer id used by ChatGPT for the prompt input.
_justifications.selectors.copy_button: Stable data-testid for per-turn copy action.
_justifications.selectors.download_artifact: Accessible Download-labelled button is a stable artifact affordance.
_justifications.selectors.message_body: Assistant message Markdown body uses stable semantic markdown container.
_justifications.selectors.new_chat_button: Accessible New chat link label is stable and non-class based.
_justifications.selectors.ready_root: Main app region containing the stable prompt composer indicates logged-in chat readiness.
_justifications.selectors.send_button: Stable data-testid for the prompt submit control.
_justifications.selectors.streaming_marker: Stable stop/streaming control observed only while generation was active.
_justifications.selectors.upload_input: Native file input is a stable upload hook and can be hidden behind the attach control.

_unverified.why: No stable DOM attribute carrying the conversation ref was verified; observed source is the URL path shape /c/<redacted-uuid>.
Bogus /c/<redacted-uuid> navigation did not expose a stable not-found marker during bounded 0-message observation; left empty fail-closed.
Not verified because login/logout is never automated; URL/auth-wall heuristics are used instead.
No safe stable model-menu selector was found after bounded 0-message discovery; left empty fail-closed rather than risking account/profile controls.
Model picker was not safely opened; options left empty fail-closed.
No disabled model option was safely observed in the opened model picker.
Not verified because this leg never provokes rate limits.
Not verified because giant/truncating generations are out of scope for this leg.

_meta.conversation_url_policy: Only path-shape URLs are recorded; real conversation ids are not written.
